# Alex Carpenter

Personal website for Alex Carpenter, Staff UI Engineer at Clerk.

## Markdown

- Homepage: https://alexcarpenter.me/index.md
- Notes index: https://alexcarpenter.me/notes.md
- Notes RSS: https://alexcarpenter.me/notes/rss.xml

## HTML

- Homepage: https://alexcarpenter.me/
- Notes: https://alexcarpenter.me/notes
- Uses: https://alexcarpenter.me/uses
